feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Education and Tuition Reimbursement in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi

We have a requirement from a customer to validate that the Education Reimbursement/Claim amount entered in SuccessFactors Global Benefits/Custom MDF matches the amount on the attached invoice/proof. Essentially, we are looking for an OCR tool to perform this validation, which should work with SuccessFactors.

Additionally, we are considering whether it's possible to manage education reimbursements through Concur. My understanding is that Concur may not fully support education reimbursements due to varying entitlements for different dependent children, such as 5000 for the first child, 7000 for the second child, and so on. Concur doesn't have these dependent details to validate this.

If users enter the claim in SuccessFactors, can we send this information to Concur for validation using its OCR capabilities?

Thanks for the help.

@karenperez @brendas

entry.title: SuccessFactors_unable to default a HRIS field value after BASIC business rule scenario gone
entry.content:
Hi All, 

With the basic rule scenario deprecated, I'm unable to find a simple scenario work. 

My use case is very simple, in the workPermitInfo HRIS element, I would like to always default (country value, let's say USA) in country field when portlet opened to enter a record. When portlet opened, country should be defaulted (however would be able to change) and then I can add other permit data and save it. 

The Trigger onView rules for HRIS elements,  which says "You can use this scenario to create rules that default the value for a field" is not working. 

I've created a onView rule on Base Object workPermitModel and it just doesn't work when assigned to the business rule. In the past I made this scenario work through Basic scenario and with ruletype"DefaultFields".

Can anybody help me on this please? How to achieve this?

Regards

DRP.

@lukemarson @btoombs @svishwas @Daichi_Kagawa, @stockp , @NarendraLahoti , @cindywang , @S_Strangfeld @ChrisPaine

entry.title: Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_Data_And_Org_Query failed
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

we're experiencing failures to below services in test and prod tenants since Jan 11, 2025, 05:52:04 

 

  • Replicate Organizational Objects from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S4HANA
  • Replicate Employee Master Data and Org. Assignments from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S4HANA

Error Text :  Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_Data_And_Org_Query_S4D failed with message "IllegalStateException:The request object has been recycled and is no longer associated with this facade"

entry.title: Report Request: Vacant Positions Due to Employee Departures
entry.content:
Good evening, everyone,

Following a requirement from the client, it was requested to create a report (if possible) that includes all vacant positions in the company, but only for roles that were previously filled by employees who have since left the organization.

In other words, we need to identify which positions the organization had and became vacant specifically due to employee departures. Positions that existed but were never occupied by any employee are not relevant for this report.

Do you have any ideas on how we could approach such a report?

Thank you!!!

entry.title: Story Reports Stopped Working Today
entry.content: Has anyone else experienced Story Reports not loading or being able to be edited today? They were working this morning but no longer work. Is there a patch or update we are not aware of?

entry.title: Hiring 2 employees on the same position, the first one is successful and the last one is failing
entry.content:
Hi, 

For my new client they are facing issues when hiring two employees on the same position. Both employees are successfully transferred from recruitment to onboarding. The first employee is successfully hired in EC, but the second employee is failing. 

Any thought on what the issue could be?

entry.title: Leave of Absence - Employee status
entry.content:
Hello,

We are seeing issues with employee status for employees on Leave of absence; The employee's status updates to align with the compensation change date, even if their actual return is in the future. 

For instance, if we have an employee on leave of absence (LOA) scheduled to return in January, but there is a compensation change effective December 1, 2024, the employee's status in the job information portlet will update to "unpaid leave" effective from December 1, 2024.

Any ideas or pointers to what could be causing this. 

Thank you

Priya

entry.title: How to remove the "Add Benefit Employee Claim Detail" button
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

This question is regarding SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Global Benefits. We were wondering about the best practices around removing the"Add Benefit Employee Claim Detail" button in the Benefit Claim UI. So far, we have set up a save rule in the Benefit Employee Claim object to prevent users from submitting multiple requests in a single submission, but we want to fully remove this option.

We have considered changing the association multiplicity between benefitEmployeeClaimDetail and benefitFuelReimbursementClaimDetail from "One to Many" to "One to One", but the system will not allow it: 

 

Has anyone done this previously? I would appreciate any feedback/advise on how to proceed around this to prevent any disruptions or data loss.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Dependents data is not appearing under "Workflow Details" screen, when Manager is going to approve
entry.content: Dependents data is not appearing under "Workflow Details" screen, when Manager is going to approve the workflow request. I already did the configuration part and check the workflow configuration.

entry.title: How to fetch data from MDF for Document Generation where there are overlapping dates?
entry.content:
We have a requirement to store contract details and generate a letter contract. Some people can hold multiple contracts at the same time. 
Example below contracts for the same employee:

Contract 1
Start Date: 1-Jan-2025
End Date: 31-Mar-2025
Role: Teacher - Science
Rate per day: $50

Contract 2
Start Date: 1-Feb-2025
End Date: 30-Jun-2025
Role: Teacher - Math
Rate per day: $65

If we were to use Document Generation, how are we able to selectively only generate the 2nd contract since the dates are overlapping and Document Generation allows selection by As Of Date, which will select both records, instead of Contract 2?

entry.title: Employee Terminated in SAP HCM showing Active in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi,

We are facing a scenario, where Employee/PERNR terminated in SAP HCM showing Active in SuccessFactors.

Please advise.

Thanks & Regards,

Kalyan C

entry.title: Digital Signature in Document Generation
entry.content:
Hi there,

I configured the requirements through the guide: SF_EC_DocumentGeneration.pdf

I get the following error when I try to create a document with the digital signature. Can anyone help me?

Thanks in advance.

 

Best regards

Antonia

entry.title: Global assignment - business rule
entry.content:
Hello dear experts,

We have initiated shot-term assignments for some colleagues who will be staying in Germany for a period of time and have noticed that on the Home profile, the employee group should have automatically changed from Employee to Expatriate and did not. 

We created a business rule but seems to not work as expected. 

Any guidance would be appreciated.

Thank you,

entry.title: From SF EC - ONB to Microsoft
entry.content:
A client of mine have configured the Microsoft enterprise app, SuccessFactors to Microsoft Active Directory User Provisioning to facilitate future hires from EC and active employments for transfers / rehire with a new active employment.

The issues they are facing: 
 
* When onboarding employees reach startDate - all data are populated, but when the onboardee is in the preboarding phase, they only get a limited amount of data for future hires, PersonIDExternal, startDate, phoneNumber, countryCode.

Does anyone have experience with this? 

All input appreciated!

entry.title: Create new recurring pay component entry with business rule
entry.content:
Hi community,

I am facing an issue right now, where I want to calculate the amount of a new recurring pay component based on another existing pay component. 

Imagine we have pay components A and B. Any user has an existing entry with pay component A. I built an onSave rule, which sets the amount of pay component B to x% of the amount of pay component A. If I try to apply this rule, I get an error, that the necessary pay component is not available. This refers to pay component B, because the user does not have a pay component B yet. If I create an entry with pay component B with any amount, the rule applies and overwrites the amount with the correct number.

Error Message

My question is: is there any way to build the onSave rule in that way, that it creates a pay component B entry in the first place and calculates the correct amount afterwards? Or do you know any other workaround which could solve my issue?

I hope my description was clear enough for you to understand my problem. If not, I am very happy to share further information/ explanation!

Thanks in advance and all the best,
Christian

entry.title: API extract all departments including head / manager of department
entry.content:
Hi 

This may be impossible, but we export all departments with legal entity from Employee Central via API to build organization hierarchy outside of SAP, but there's no easy way to also retrieve managers of any departments?

I haven't found any link between department and manager for employees in the department.

neither an easy way to export a manager and all connected employees through API

entry.title: Business rule in Employee Central to check the start date of an absence under administer time
entry.content: Employee central: I want to write a business rule that checks the start date of the absence record created under the employee's profile - administer time UI, and if the start date is before a specific start date, then an error should be displayed on save.  I checked the sap blogs and see that we need to write a Take Rule, but not sure where to assign this take rule?  Can anyone guide me on this?

entry.title: Can you Restrict Allowed File Type Extensions in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Good day,

Hope you are well.
Is it currently possible to restrict File Type Extensions that employees can upload on fields such as:
Social ID Document.

Thank you!

Kind regards

RDJ

entry.title: Buying & Selling Leaves
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a standard functionality of selling back leaves in SF EC Time management, this should also include integration to ECP and payroll processing for sold leaves. 

Can buying or selling leaves has to be managed in EC Benefits  or EC Time management. 

Thanks

Shilpa

entry.title: EC Alert Email Notifications - Tips to test/preview emails?
entry.content:
Hi all, I was wondering if anyone had any neat tricks or suggestions to send themselves a preview email of EC Alerts, maintained in Manage Data > Alert Messages? 

As these alert messages are tied to business rules which rely on complex scenarios, it would be great to be able to send a preview email somehow, even if it involved creating a dummy business rule to generate the notification, but thought I'd ask on here on the off chance that someone had discovered a nice simple way of achieving this!

Many thanks in advance.
